name: youragent
description: Your first agent, done right. One-line bootstrap that drops a .agent/ scaffold — personality, memory, bead-graph task ledger, and a 130-pattern knowledge catalog — into any repo. Built by the Trilogy AI Center of Excellence. Tool-agnostic: Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenClaw, Aider, Windsurf.

scripts.test:
tmp=/tmp/.youragent-test-$$ && rm -rf "$tmp" && mkdir -p "$tmp" && NO_ANIM=1 BOOTSTRAP_TARGET="$tmp/.agent" bash install.sh >/dev/null && printf '# IDENTITY.md

## Name

**Scribe** — maintainer agent for the youragent package itself

## Purpose

This agent exists to keep the youragent scaffold correct, useful, and shippable.
' > "$tmp/.agent/IDENTITY.md" && (cd "$tmp" && NO_ANIM=1 bash /Users/stanhus/youragent/install.sh status | grep -q 'Scribe') && (cd "$tmp" && NO_ANIM=1 bash /Users/stanhus/youragent/install.sh validate >/dev/null) && rm -rf "$tmp"
